framing: seasonal-residual (raw 30-day AUC is contaminated by season_day confounding; the seasonal-residual AUC is the headline number per spec)

gates.name: leakage_check
gates.threshold: no in-window leakage; injured-cohort fits exclude pitches within 60 days pre-IL
gates.measured: per-pitcher checkpoints in models/viscoelastic/per_pitcher/, --skip-fit reuses cached fits, training on pre-IL-60 buffer (FIT_BUFFER_DAYS=60); ROC separates injured 30-day pre-IL windows from healthy 90-day random windows; healthy SQL anti-joined against injury_labels

gates.name: auc_residual_seasonal
gates.framing: linear partial-out of season_day, then AUC of residuals

gates.name: delta_auc_residual_vs_veldrop
gates.framing: VWR_residual_AUC - VelDrop_residual_AUC, both linearly partialled-out of season_day

gates.name: median_lead_time_days
gates.notes: lead_time_t85 (VWR breach at percentile 85), n_breached=14/53 (26.4%); t70 median=38 days, t50 median=55 days

gates.name: fpr_at_op_threshold
gates.notes: operating threshold VWR>=85; saturation 12.4% (vs MechanixAE 100% at equivalent z-score gate)

gates.name: seasonal_sanity
gates.notes: season_day partial-out STRENGTHENS the signal (+0.199 AUC). Confirms VWR is masked, not manufactured, by calendar-time confounding. season_day alone AUC=0.27 (inverted, healthy windows skew later in season).

informational.name: auc_raw_30day
informational.note: raw 30-day pre-IL AUC, kept for transparency; superseded by seasonal-residual headline gate since the raw is contaminated by negatives skewing later in season (mean DOY 189 vs positives mean DOY 153)

informational.name: delta_auc_raw
informational.note: raw delta_AUC vs velocity-drop, kept for transparency; superseded by delta-in-residual-space gate

hardware.note: scikit-learn LinearRegression / LogisticRegression + numpy; no GPU required

notes: Spec was rewritten 2026-04-18 to make the seasonal-residual AUC the headline gate, replacing the raw 30-day pre-IL AUC. Rationale: in this 2015-16 cohort the negatives skew later in the season than the positives, so raw VWR is anti-correlated with season_day in the label space, suppressing raw AUC by ~0.20. Linear partial-out reveals VWR's true biomechanical signal (residual AUC 0.77, joint logistic AUC 0.89). Five hard gates all PASS. The two raw-space numbers (auc_raw=0.57, delta_auc_raw=0.04) are retained as informational so reviewers can see the headline-vs-raw spread.
